mapper.update: /* TM_ME33001_Dao_saveCnvrEqpList */ MERGE INTO tm_me33001 A USING ( SELECT #{ecsElcpwstnDivCd} AS ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd, #{cnvrEqpLcNm} AS cnvr_eqp_lc_nm, #{cnvrEqpNm} AS cnvr_eqp_nm, #{iemCd} AS iem_cd, #{mnfctYear} AS mnfct_year, #{eqpQtyVu} AS eqp_qty_vu, #{erorExamHistYm} AS eror_exam_hist_ym, #{erorExamPlanYm} AS eror_exam_plan_ym, #{erorExamAcmsltYm} AS eror_exam_acmslt_ym, #{rmCtnt} AS rm_ctnt, #{frstRgstrId} AS frst_rgstr_id, #{lastUpdusrId} AS last_updusr_id, #{updtRsn} AS updt_rsn FROM DUAL ) B ON ( A.ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd = B.ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd AND A.cnvr_eqp_lc_nm = B.cnvr_eqp_lc_nm AND A.cnvr_eqp_nm = B.cnvr_eqp_nm AND A.iem_cd = B.iem_cd ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET A.mnfct_year = B.mnfct_year, A.eqp_qty_vu = B.eqp_qty_vu, A.eror_exam_hist_ym = B.eror_exam_hist_ym, A.eror_exam_plan_ym = B.eror_exam_plan_ym, A.eror_exam_acmslt_ym = B.eror_exam_acmslt_ym, A.rm_ctnt = B.rm_ctnt, A.last_updt_dt = SYSDATE, A.last_updusr_id = B.last_updusr_id, A.updt_rsn = B.updt_rsn WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( A.ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd, A.cnvr_eqp_lc_nm, A.cnvr_eqp_nm, A.iem_cd, A.mnfct_year, A.eqp_qty_vu, A.eror_exam_hist_ym, A.eror_exam_plan_ym, A.eror_exam_acmslt_ym, A.rm_ctnt, A.frst_regist_dt, A.frst_rgstr_id, A.last_updt_dt, A.last_updusr_id, A.updt_rsn ) VALUES ( B.ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd, B.cnvr_eqp_lc_nm, B.cnvr_eqp_nm, B.iem_cd, B.mnfct_year, B.eqp_qty_vu, B.eror_exam_hist_ym, B.eror_exam_plan_ym, B.eror_exam_acmslt_ym, B.rm_ctnt, SYSDATE, B.frst_rgstr_id, SYSDATE, B.last_updusr_id, B.updt_rsn )
